detail.description:
Warning: This game may cause intermittent frustration, sudden bursts of laughter, and a strong desire to show off to your friends!

Say goodbye to boredom! The Brain Puzzle series is back with a brand-new sequel, Crazy Mind—and this time, it's for real!  We've prepared countless mind-bending levels designed specifically to cure ""boredom"" and ""slow reflexes."" Don't worry, this isn't an exam—it's a fun-filled mental adventure!

 Think you're smart enough? That's because you haven't tried Crazy
detail.releaseNotes:
• Fixed some bugs
• Improved game stability
